# Streaming

EuroBioC2026 offers **free** live streaming for conference sessions.

Each session room has its own link. Please use the links in the table below to
join the appropriate stream.

For the complete conference timetable, session details, and room information,
see the [programme](schedule.qmd).

| Session room | Stream link |
|--------------|-------------|
| Presidentti  | [https://utu.zoom.us/j/62224935664](https://utu.zoom.us/j/62224935664) |
| Ministeri    | [https://utu.zoom.us/j/69930439987](https://utu.zoom.us/j/69930439987) |
| Tellervo     | [https://utu.zoom.us/j/63995894726](https://utu.zoom.us/j/63995894726) |

# Recordings

Recordings from streamed sessions will be made available after the conference on
the [Bioconductor YouTube channel](https://www.youtube.com/@bioconductor).
